summary: Claude-First Maintainability Refactor — Phase 1-3, 4e (migrations), 5, 6 complete. Phase 4 megafile splits for the other 8 files deferred to focused future sessions per docs/refactor.md status appendix.
commits: 1496a18 Refactor Phase 1: integration tests for sites-ingester, library-watcher, sync-processor
aef6836 Refactor Phase 2: extract AI_SEGMENTED_LANGUAGES to shared constants
0a80953 Refactor Phase 3: rename collisions + extract shared text-normalize
92e007c Refactor Phase 4e: split migrations.js (2,645 lines) into versioned files
9944622 Refactor Phase 5: per-directory CLAUDE.md routers (15 files)
3955740 Refactor Phase 6: status appendix in docs/refactor.md

decisions_made.deferred_megafile_splits: 8 megafiles left in place: search.js (2k), ingester.js (2.1k), segmenter.js (3.8k), translation.js (2.6k), admin.js (3.9k), library.js (3.8k), ChatInterface.svelte (5.4k), DocumentPresentation.svelte (3.3k). Each flagged in its dir CLAUDE.md. Doing rushed unattended splits would land broken code. Recommended sub-file structures documented in docs/refactor.md.
decisions_made.religion_constants_deferred: agent-librarian.js uses different religion conventions (Hinduism vs Hindu) than the DB. Aligning is a behavior change worth its own focused PR. Skipped tonight.
decisions_made.auto_headers_skipped: Per-file navigation headers (// purpose. Exports: ... Deps: ...) NOT bulk-generated — auto-headers add noise without information. Files I touched have hand-curated headers; future sessions add headers as they touch each file.

verification.result: 27 test files passed, 1 skipped, 1004/1004 tests passing, 0 regressions
smoke_imports: api/lib/migrations.js exports: CURRENT_VERSION, USER_DB_CURRENT_VERSION, getMigration44SQL, migrations, runMigrations, userMigrations
api/lib/constants/languages.js exports: AI_SEGMENTED_LANGUAGES, RTL_LANGUAGES, isAiSegmentedLanguage, isRtlLanguage

what_user_can_do_next: Review docs/refactor.md status appendix for what landed and what's deferred.

Pick any megafile from the deferred table (e.g. api/lib/search.js, smallest of the remaining at 2k LOC) and replicate the migrations.js split pattern: extract subgroups into sub-files under api/lib/search/, replace original with a re-export shim.
If splitting search.js, see api/lib/CLAUDE.md for the recommended sub-file structure.

Production deploy: not done tonight per plan. Frontend changes auto-deploy on next commit (pre-commit hook runs build + wrangler pages deploy). Backend deploys via tower-nas updater on git push (already pushed).
